Video.summary: In this episode Andy and his friend Scotty take on Kodiak Island, Alaska for an adventure of Salmon fishing and hunting black tail deer. Whilst traversing steep mountains in the company of Kodiak brown bears and taking on cold Alaskan waters, Andy presents useful information for fellow outdoor enthusiasts all whilst building friendships with the great people of Kodiak Big Timber Lodge.
Video.title: Wildbound - "Alaska"

Video.summary: In part 1 of the British episodes, Andy starts his road trip around the United Kingdom in the Cotswolds where he sets out to hunt and taste the beautiful venison that Michelin star chef, Mark Robinson has to offer. He then proceeds to travel to the border of Scotland where he samples some of the finest and most historic bird shooting practices found throughout the British Isles.
Video.title: Wildbound - "UK Part 1"

Video.summary: In part 2 of the British episodes, Andy visits the majestic land of Scotland. Here he is introduced to Scottish deer stalking, a type of hunting that is full of history and etiquette. He hunts ‘monarch’ stags and goes into the Atlantic waters to find some of the freshest shellfish on the planet which he, and Mike Robinson cook and eat. Concluding the British episodes in a place as wild as Scotland really sets the tone for the series.
Video.title: Wildbound - "UK Part 2"

Video.summary: On this weeks episode of Hunting Land Man, Slade and his daughter Asa take on the turkey woods together for the first time. As this is Asa's first time turkey hunting some quick pre hunt preparations are in order. Slade also was able to sit down with a good friend and registered forester to talk fire and the benefits of fire in land management. The next day, Asa and Slade were able to connect with a thundering tom as Asa punched her first ever turkey tag!
Video.title: "Asa's First Turkey!"

Video.summary: Capt. Jonathan Moss ventures to South Florida with the hope of having a few Exotic Encounters.
Video.title: "Exotic Encounters"

Video.summary: Central Florida’s St. John’s River is home to countless species of wildlife, making this sweet water estuary the perfect playground for a pair of river rats, Captains Jonathan Moss and Nick Clark.
Video.title: "River Rats"

Video.summary: Captains Scott and Steve start the season with Capt. Scott Stoky chasing Islamorada Tunas and Mahis offshore out of Plantation Boat Mart.
Video.title: "Islamorada Blackfins And Mahis With Capt Scott Stoky"

Image.alt: "Islamorada Blackfins And Mahis With Capt Scott Stoky"
"Islamorada Blackfins And Mahis With Capt Scott Stoky"
"Islamorada Blackfins And Mahis With Capt Scott Stoky"

Video.summary: Captains Scott and Steve catch a mixed bag bottom fishing off of Islamorada with Captain Scott Stoky.
Video.title: "Islamorada Mixed Bag"

Video.summary: Captains Scott and Steve go yellow tailing out of Hawks Cay for a limit of tasty yellowtail snapper and Steve picks a battle with a big lemon shark.
Video.title: "Yellowtails And Lemons At Hawks Cay"

Video.summary: Captains Scott and Steve bounce around the reefs out of Hawks Cay catching a wide variety of reef dwellers.
Video.title: "Reef Fishing Out Of Hawks Cay"

Video.summary: Captains Scott and Steve take their brand new Invincible 36’ out of Plantation Boat Mart to fly the kites for some early season sailfishing.
Video.title: "Sailfish Season"

Video.summary: Captains Scott and Steve make a big run from Plantation Boat Mart in the Invincible 36’ into the green Gulf waters to fill the Yeti cooler and battle with some seas monsters.
Video.title: "Into The Green"

Video.summary: We are at West Boggs Lake in Indiana for annual veterans appreciation day. We are joined by Jeff and James Hall. Father and son. It was a great day just saying thanks to them for their service. Thanks to Centerpoint Energy and Indiana 811 for supporting this annual event and West Boggs Park.
Video.title: "Tribute to Veterans, Father and Son"

Video.summary: Capt. Jared and Father-Son duo Captain’s Hunter & Chris Barron have Sailfish in their sights.
Video.title: "Like Father Like Son"

Video.summary: Orange Lake is a bass angler's paradise, known for its enormous trophy bass. On this episode of Local Lines TV, we dive into these rich waters to uncover the secrets of catching these giants. Get ready for thrilling action and expert tips from Brandon Branch and Trevor Fitzgerald.
Video.title: "Discovering Orange Lake"

Video.summary: Opening day in Mississippi has arrived and Slade is taking full advantage of it! With the weather not cooperating Slade and Zeb stumble into a turkey hunt they won't soon forget. Two days later, the hot streak continues with Slade connecting on another turkey on an 83 acre property he has for sale! Also, Slade gives some tips and his ideas on small acreage hunting, and how it can be just as lucrative as big tracks of land!
Video.title: "Opening Week in Mississippi started off with a BANG!!"

Image.alt: "Opening Week in Mississippi started off with a BANG!!"
"Opening Week in Mississippi started off with a BANG!!"
"Opening Week in Mississippi started off with a BANG!!"

Video.summary: Captain C.A. heads to Brownsville, Texas, to chase trout and redfish with well-known local guide Captain Ernest Cisneros.
Video.title: "On the Border"

Video.summary: Water quality is everything—and the Star brite - SeaSafe team is back at it for the second year in a row! Led by Cory Redwine, Conservation Director of Project SeaSafe, this is the 4th Annual Clean Water Collective and it’s bigger than ever. This time, we’re in Grant, Florida, where 4 million clams are being released into the Indian River Lagoon, paired with the planting of thousands of mangroves, oyster work by CCA and trash clean ups to help restore one of Florida’s most critical ecosystems. But it’s not just about hard work—it’s about connection. With local captains, fishing legends, and the Local Knowledge crew on hand, we hit the water to show why this place is worth fighting for. From clam drops by drone, to in-water mangrove planting, to monster snook catches, this is hands-on conservation at its best. This two-part series kicks off with action, heart, and the kind of hope only a healthy waterway can bring. Don’t miss Part 1—where conservation meets community and everyone gets their hands wet.
Video.title: "SeaSafe Snook Part 1"

Video.summary: As part of this year's Star brite Sea Safe event, we hit the water to experience some of the incredible fishing the Indian River Lagoon has to offer. For Rush, that meant some serious bow time with close friend Alex Hughey - on the hunt for some of the biggest snook we've ever encountered. The bite wasn't easy, but that didn't stop Rush from smashing his personal best - not once, but twice - in one unforgettable day on the water. Don't miss this action-packed episode of the Sea Safe adventure from beautiful Sebastian, Florida!
Video.title: "SeaSafe Snook Part 2"

Video.summary: The Local Knowledge crew heads to Catalina Island off the coast of Southern California to participate in the 2024 War Heroes On Water tournament. This event offers a unique opportunity for the sport fishing community to create meaningful connections with our nation's heroes while raising awareness of the challenges they sometimes face when transitioning back to civilian life. With a little bit of luck and a lot of teamwork, Ali and Rush hope to put their veterans on a Bluefin tuna bite they won't forget!
Video.title: "War Heroes On Water"

Video.summary: Rush takes up an invite from good friend and fellow guide Jared Cyr to sight fish for barracuda and bonefish in the shallow waters of the Florida Keys. Meanwhile Rush's boat takes a break from charter fishing to get a new Seakeeper RIDE system installed.
Video.title: "Flats Ride"

Video.summary: After a great trip fishing the flats, Rush returns the favor and extends an invite to friend Jarred Cyr fishing offshore. Fishing in Key West is all about the variety of species and opportunities they present. Mixing it up and taking advantage of this, the guys decide to see how many species they can catch using light spin and fly tackle offshore.
Video.title: "Trading Trips"

Video.summary: The LK crew returns to Guatemala with more friends for our yearly dose of world class fishing! Year after year, Casa Vieja Lodge continues to impress with daily shots at sailfish, marlin, mahi, and tuna. Tag along on our 2nd annual group trip for a tropical fishing experience like no other!
Video.title: "Return to Casa Vieja Lodge"

Video.summary: Captains Scott Walker and Steve Rodger chase the full moon Wahoo bite fishing out of Plantation Boat Mart.
Video.title: "Wahoos on the November Full Moon"

Video.summary: In this episode, Slade and the new producer (Tim Guidroz) go out on their first turkey hunt together, and even though the weather is not ideal, they get the job done on a Wilkinson County gobbler. We also get a look at what the United Country - Southern States Realty office looks like during turkey season, with interviews from Scott Lindsey and Caleb Armstrong, and three big properties closing in Baton Rouge.
Video.title: "Turkeys Vs. Real Estate"

Video.summary: CA heads to Jupiter to fish with Ryan Nitz for giant snook.
Video.title: "Bait Boys"

Video.summary: Embark on a journey through Scotland's hunting traditions, exploring bird shoots, grouse moors, and red stag hunts while discovering the evolving role of hunting in conservation.
Video.title: "Scotland’s Hunting Tradition"

Video.summary: Navigating the complex issues of deer management, Dan Cabela travels between Scotland and England to learn how land managers balance conservation with wild food harvesting.
Video.title: "Great Britain's Deer"

Video.summary: Melissa Bachman has made her name over the last two decades as one of the most dedicated hunters and producers in the outdoor industry. In this episode we’ll tag along with Melissa while she chases big game around the world with her Winchester in hand. First we’ll head to Colorado as Melissa spot and stalks giant mule deer, then we’ll head across the pond to New Zealand to chase mountain ibex and tar, then head back to the states for Montana whitetail at ground level.
Video.title: “Big Game Bachman”

Video.summary: Shotgun sports are experiencing unprecedented growth, with competitions across the country gaining popularity as enthusiasts vie to be the best shooters in the world. Every summer, the Amateur Trapshooting Association hosts The Grand American in Sparta, Illinois. This year marks the 125th Anniversary for the largest trap shooting competition in the world. We’ll talk with the people who make this tournament run behind the scenes and explore what makes this tournament such a special event. We’ll also look at the rich history of The Grand. On-site we’ll chat with the curator of the Trapshooting Hall of Fame and look at some of the incredible historical pieces on display in the museum. Additionally, we’ll learn about White Flyer and how the clay manufacturer has made important innovations for the shotgun sports.
Video.title: "A Grand History"

Video.summary: Nobody chases the waterfowl migration as hard as Shawn Stahl of Team Winchester. The Michigan native spends over half of his year running the highways and flyways searching for the x. In this episode, we’ll tag along with Shawn and his crew with their Winchester pumps in hand as they hunker down hiding in fields and timber in hopes of locked wings from ducks and geese.
Video.title: "Stahled Out"

Video.summary: Overview: East Alton, Illinois is the home of Winchester Ammunition and the manufacturing home of the shotshell plants that build and produce millions of rounds of ammo for hunters, sport shooters, military and law enforcement. Get an unprecedented inside look at the birth cycle of a shotshell inside the walls of Winchester. From hull to primer, shot to wad and packaging to shipping, watch how the most legendary and successful ammunition brand in the world comes to is born and built.
Video.title: "Building The Legend"

Video.summary: Charles Rodney’s relationship with his hunting dogs, passion for field-to-table living and connection to the land make his love for chasing rabbits contagious while the heritage of Winchester’s small game ammunition makes this beloved pastime accessible for generations to come. Also: a Model 42 collection for the ages and hunting Kansas coyotes with the Keefer Brothers.
Video.title: "The Rabbit Hunter"

Video.summary: Deer season — the sights, the sounds and the smells stick with you. It’s about remembering those who came before us and setting the right example for those who look up to us. It’s about protecting the tradition, so they always have something to look forward to. When communities come together, we see the real reason for this special time of year.
Video.title: “Deer Season”

Video.summary: On opening day of Missouri’s gun season, hunters from around the state seek ridges and box blinds throughout the “Show Me” state in search of mature whitetail bucks. For Nikki Boxler and the Winchester Deer Camp, it’s no different. With Winchester’s in hand, Nikki and crew play cat and mouse with several mature bucks at Indian Hill Outfitters in Pike County.
Video.title: "Midwest Monarchs"

Video.summary: Every season, just like clockwork, mission-driven longboards gobble their way across the plains of South Dakota, the cornfields of Iowa, the timbered ridges of Michigan and the cattle ground of Kansas looking for their soulmates in one of the most celebrated hunting seasons in America…the wild turkey breeding season. Join Team Winchester as they stalk, call, flank and roost boss gobblers into range from coast to coast.
Video.title: “Lovesick Longbeards”

Video.summary: In this episode Andy goes back to his home farm in Alabama for deer and quail hunting. Not only does he make incredible dishes with his former ‘masterchef’ contestant Alex which he serves to local children in need but he explains how hunting is never about “just the hunt” but about the camaraderie, friendship and memories made through the pursuit of the harvest.
Video.title: Wildbound - "Alabama"

Video.summary: This week, we reflect on a tragic and sad memory in our lives as we remember a dear childhood friend of my son Nick, Nathan Wimsatt. Our families have been close for man years and shared a lot of time together around the soccer field, vacations, fishing trips, and much more. Nathan passed in a tragic car accident at only 18 years on April 29th, 2023. This week his Dad Brian is joining me on Lake Taylorsville where we'll share some memories and celebrate Nathan's life...that ended way to soon!
Video.title: "Life Is A Highway"

Video.summary: This week we're joined by our good friend and Worship Leader, Rob Key. A tremendous musical talent that's chased the country music dream, but found his calling as worship leader at Taylorsville Community Church. Rob's love for serving the Lord is his top priority, but he certainly enjoys the great outdoors and especially doing a little fishing.
Video.title: "Worship, Music, and Bassin'"

Video.summary: Capt. Jared Raskob joins the legendary offshore Capt. Scott Stoky for a day of fishing in Islamorada, Florida.
Video.title: "Stoky"

Video.summary: Capt. Jared Raskob joins his long time friends Capt. Tyler Webb and Capt. Casey Yaworski on a hunt for Sails in Islamorada, Florida.
Video.title: "Tyler & Casey"

Video.summary: Mitch Widom, Andy Yaffa, & Chris Hammaway join Capt. Jared Raskob in Los Cabos on the hunt for Striped Marlin Part 1.
Video.title: "Cabo Marlin Part 1"

Video.summary: Capt. Jared Raskob joins Capt. Tucker Ersek and his father for a day of sail fishing off Ocean Reef in the Florida Keys.
Video.title: "The Fish Whisperer"

Video.summary: A day of reef fishing in Islamorada turns into a Kingfish and Yellowtail frenzy for Captains Scott and Steve.
Video.title: "Silver And Gold"

Video.summary: It only takes 3 fish to fill the Yeti cooler when Capt. Scott fishes the top with kites for Wahoo and Steve pulls a big Mutton Snapper off the bottom.
Video.title: "Wahoos On Kites"

Video.summary: Brandon meets up with his buddy Dave for some crystal river bank beating. Throwing top water lures on the nature coast? It doesn’t get much better than this!
Video.title: "Top Water Dave"

Video.summary: Watch along as Brandon Branch chases yellowfin with the guys from Fishing Florida Charters!
Video.title: "Long Shot"

Video.summary: Check out this episode of Local Lines where Brandon Branch Chases Bluefin Tuna out of San Diago.
Video.title: "Tuna Alley"

Video.summary: Today, Capt. Danny is joined by his son Dillan for a plug-filled day in their local waters of Cedar Key, FL!
Video.title: "Pluggin' The Roots"
